mapper.select:
SELECT a.meter_num AS meterNum, a.valve_status AS valveStatus, a.setting_status AS settingStatus, a.actual_status AS actualStatus, a.in_temperature AS inTemp, a.out_temperature AS outTemp, a.voltage AS voltage, a.valve_time AS valveTime, a.reporting_interval AS reportInterval, a.interval_unit AS reportingUnit, a.valid_time AS validTime, a.signal_strength AS csq, b.org_name AS orgName, b.building_name AS buildingName, b.unit_code AS unitCode, b.room_num AS roomNum FROM pr_heat_valve_archive a INNER JOIN pr_house b ON b.id = a.house_id WHERE a.is_changed = 0 AND a.meter_arc_code <> '04310101' AND a.valve_status IS NOT NULL AND a.meter_num IN
#{meterNum}
